case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DODER, PETER A

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,119.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DODER, PETER A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
